FFmpeg LGPL shared build — pinned
=================================

Source repository : https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds
Upstream archive  : ffmpeg-n7.1.3-45-g2d6ee37238-win64-lgpl-shared-7.1.zip
Release tag       : autobuild-2026-04-23-13-16
Pin date (UTC)    : 2026-04-23

FFmpeg version    : n7.1.3-45-g2d6ee37238 (7.1.x series)
Build type        : lgpl-shared (NOT gpl, NOT static)
Target platform   : Windows x64

Runtime DLLs shipped in bin/
-----------------------------
  avcodec-61.dll
  avformat-61.dll
  avutil-59.dll
  swresample-5.dll
  swscale-8.dll

Import libs shipped in lib/
----------------------------
  avcodec.lib    (+ avcodec-61.def, libavcodec.dll.a)
  avformat.lib   (+ avformat-61.def, libavformat.dll.a)
  avutil.lib     (+ avutil-59.def, libavutil.dll.a)
  swresample.lib (+ swresample-5.def, libswresample.dll.a)
  swscale.lib    (+ swscale-8.def, libswscale.dll.a)

Headers shipped in include/
----------------------------
  libavcodec/
  libavformat/
  libavutil/
  libswresample/
  libswscale/

Removed components (unused in this project)
--------------------------------------------
  bin/avfilter-*.dll, bin/avdevice-*.dll  (no postproc in LGPL build)
  bin/ffmpeg.exe, bin/ffprobe.exe, bin/ffplay.exe
  lib/avfilter.lib, lib/avdevice.lib
  include/libavfilter/, include/libavdevice/

Upgrade notes
-------------
  - Replacement MUST use the same major DLL version numbers shown above
    (avcodec-61, avformat-61, avutil-59, swresample-5, swscale-8).
    A major-version bump requires updating cmake/FindFFmpegLGPL.cmake and
    all /DELAYLOAD:avXXX-YY.dll linker flags to match the new filenames.
  - Always use an lgpl-shared (not GPL, not static) build to preserve
    LGPL dynamic-linking compliance.
  - Do NOT use the rolling "latest" tag — always pin to a dated autobuild
    tag so the tree is reproducible.
  - To upgrade: download a new autobuild-YYYY-MM-DD-HH-MM asset with the
    desired version, repeat the trim steps from this session, update this
    file, and commit the diff.
